summary: Validated Android CI template updates via targeted pytest checks for C++ structure, Gradle build matrix, and artifact upload paths. All executed checks passed.
action_items: Run the GitHub Actions workflow once end-to-end to confirm real Android toolchain compilation/runtime beyond static template checks.
critical_code_review_comments: android_bridge.cpp currently forces useJuceProcessor_ = false in Engine::create(), which bypasses plugin processor creation; verify this is intentional for release behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: No prior iteration reports existed. /app/memory/test_credentials.md is missing in this workspace (not needed for this non-auth task).
rca of the issue: Original reported Gradle/APK failure likely rooted in native C++ structure break near Engine::create/startAudio. Current file structure tests pass and workflow/Gradle templates include explicit debug+release build and artifact handling.
